one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to lay out a 14-page agriculture-franchise prospectus that stays 100% on-brand and turns supplied copy, numbers and photos into a polished press-ready PDF plus an editable source file.
input_assets: brand guidelines PDF (logo usage, palette, fonts, image style)
raw content outline / copy deck (market opportunity, training, projected returns)
brand color hex list + logo files
outputs: 14-page multi-page design (A4) as a Canva design

workflow.note: locate/confirm the client's supplied logo + photos in CC storage before composition
crop/resize the hero and spread photos to the placement frames per spread
normalize exposure/color on the supplied farm photos so all spreads match
build the 14-page prospectus skeleton (cover, market, support, training, returns, infographic pages) headless
push the cleaned logo, photos and chart imagery into the Canva design
place copy deck text, photos, infographic numbers/tables into each of the 14 pages on-brand
export press-ready PDF and keep the Canva design as the editable source

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to recreate clean automotive-style wiring diagrams of existing harnesses from photo/example references the client supplies.
input_assets: photos/scans of the existing physical harnesses
example wiring diagrams to match the visual style

workflow.note: pull the supplied harness reference photos and example diagrams into CC
crop each harness reference photo to the diagram region of interest
vectorize the connector/symbol shapes from the reference into clean SVG paths
lay out the wiring schematic: place vectorized symbols, route line segments, add wire-color labels and pin numbers
add the gauge/pin/color text labels and legend matching the example style
export SVG + PDF of the finished diagram

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to create a fabric brochure for Somato Textiles that showcases their furniture-fabric range to manufacturer partners on a startup budget.

workflow.note: crop the fabric swatch photos to uniform tiles for the brochure grid
color-correct the swatch photos so fabric tones read true across the spread
find a clean catalog/brochure template suited to a textile lookbook
instantiate the brochure from the chosen template
upload the cleaned swatch tiles and logo into the design
place swatch tiles, fabric names/codes, company blurb and contact info
export print-ready PDF and retain editable source

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to design a luxurious, high-end print brochure for a VIP chauffeur car-hire service that highlights its services and vehicles.

workflow.note: cut out hero vehicle shots to a transparent PNG for clean placement
apply a moody premium look preset to the fleet photos for a luxe feel
crop the vehicle imagery to the brochure's hero and grid frames
find an upscale brochure template matching a luxury automotive feel
instantiate the brochure layout
upload cut-out vehicles, graded photos and logo
place imagery, service list, pricing and contact copy
export print-ready PDF + editable source

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to build a 60+ page catalog for fire trucks, ambulances, PPE, SCBAs and rescue tools that presents each product's features, specs and pricing professionally.
input_assets: product data CSV (name, features, specs, price)
outputs: editable source file (one product page per data row)

workflow.note: cut PPE/tool photos to transparent PNG for consistent product shots
normalize all product images to uniform catalog frame sizes
author a repeatable product-page brand template with fields for image/name/spec/price
publish the template so the product CSV can be data-merged into it
map the product CSV columns to the template fields
autofill one product page per CSV row to build the 60+ page body, then add cover/section dividers
export the full print-ready PDF + editable source

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to prepare a visually appealing product catalog covering all the equipment/products the company sells.
input_assets: product list with names/specs/prices (CSV or sheet)

workflow.note: isolate each product onto a clean background for uniform catalog shots
resize all product images to a consistent grid frame
author a product-card brand template (image/name/spec/price fields)
publish the template for data-merge
bind the product CSV to template fields
autofill product pages from the CSV and add cover + contact page
export print-ready PDF + source

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to convert AI-generated raster images into clean, node-optimized, CMYK print-ready vector artwork formatted to the manufacturer's large-format backlit trade-show display template.
input_assets: manufacturer print template with safe-zone/bleed marks

workflow.note: pull the supplied AI-generated raster images and the manufacturer template into CC
trim each raster to its art bounds before tracing
trace each raster into clean optimized SVG paths (controlled node count, not millions)
export the assembled .ai vector artwork to PNG/PDF/SVG; the genuine .ai is the editable deliverable
produce the additional EPS/SVG/PDF format variants for delivery

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to produce two print-ready pop-up canopy layout templates (10x10 ft and 10x15 ft) with their logo worked in to bleed/safe-zone specs, plus 3-D mockups from multiple viewpoints.
input_assets: manufacturer fabric template / dieline with bleed + safe zones
outputs: two print-ready vector files (10x10 and 10x15) with outlined fonts
high-res mockups from at least two viewpoints

workflow.note: pull logo + manufacturer dieline templates into CC
vectorize the logo if supplied as raster so it scales for large-format
build the 10x10 canopy panel layout placing the logo across roof/valance per safe zones
reflow the layout to the 10x15 ratio for the second template
position logo and brand color fields on both, respecting bleed/safe markers
export both print-ready files (PDF) plus mockup-ready PNGs

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to assemble 20 scattered text+illustration pairs into a single polished, illustration-rich Kindle-ready ebook that passes Amazon's checks.
input_assets: page-by-page outline mapping text to image

workflow.note: gather the 20 supplied illustrations into a working folder
size each illustration to consistent page dimensions for Fire/Kindle
build the 20-page book: place each text block with its mapped illustration, consistent margins/page breaks
upload the resized illustrations into the design
flow text and pair images per the page outline, set uniform image sizing
export the formatted book (PDF/EPUB source for KDP conversion)

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to refine and finish an 80%-complete 100+ page automotive product catalog by improving layout consistency, replacing amateur elements and elevating the visuals per the existing brand profile.
input_assets: product images and technical spec content
list of marked corrections and new products

workflow.note: convert the supplied catalog PDF into a genuine .indd to work the layout
redo amateur cut-outs: clean product image backgrounds to transparent
retouch/normalize product photos for consistent quality
standardize image frames across pages for layout consistency
replace amateur elements, fix spacing and apply consistent brand styling across pages
export the finished .indd catalog to press-ready PDF

workflow.note: cut out the prize hero (car/watch) to a transparent PNG
apply a bold premium/high-contrast look to the prize hero
add a brand-color gradient/overlay backdrop for the hero image
build the square ad with prize hero, headline, ticket price and CTA
upload the cut-out prize + logo into the design
reflow into 1080x1920 story and 1080x1350 portrait sizes
export all social sizes as PNG

crop photos to the trifold panel frames

instantiate the trifold layout
place all copy, logo and photos per the structural reference, keeping it minimal

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to drop the client's existing artwork into a manufacturer-supplied template quickly as a small, fast turnaround job.

workflow.note: pull the existing artwork and manufacturer template into CC
scale the artwork to the template's placement dimensions
recreate the template canvas at the spec size
upload the resized artwork
position the artwork into the template's safe area

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to update an existing automotive parts product catalog by adding new products and applying marked revisions while keeping the existing layout unchanged.

clean backgrounds on the new product photos to match existing style
size new product images to the existing catalog frames

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to lay out an Oil & Gas startup's company brochure into a polished, corporate, print-ready booklet from supplied copy, photos and a preferred color scheme.

crop photos to the booklet's grid frames

instantiate the booklet layout
populate every page with copy, photos and the preferred palette

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to redesign ~89 slides across four technical training presentations into a cohesive, modern, infographic-rich certification program in fully editable PowerPoint.

workflow.note: gather the four source decks and supporting imagery
clean up any photographic assets used on slides
build a consistent slide theme/layout system (title, content, infographic, comparison layouts)

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to create clean professional website infographics/banners for industrial inspection equipment using supplied transparent product PNGs, with realistic shadows, subtle gradients and supporting icons.

size product PNGs to the banner layout dimensions

add brand typography, icons, gradient and realistic shadow shapes

refresh product photography to match the new web brand

one_liner: The business wants the freelancer to remove the backgrounds from vintage motocross motorcycle photos and replace them with a pure white background.

invert to target the background area
solid-fill the inverted background with pure white

Force the mark to solid black so it is a true single-color logo.
Vectorize the cleaned black mark → clean SVG with transparent background.
